label: Jupiter Flashloan (Borrow → Swap → Repay)
description: Execute a zero-fee flashloan via Jupiter Lend. Borrows an asset, executes a Jupiter swap (arbitrage or collateral swap), then repays — all atomically in one transaction. If the repayment fails, the entire transaction reverts. The Lend program address is jup3YeL8QhtSx1e253b2FDvsMNC87fDrgQZivbrndc9. Uses the @jup-ag/lend/flashloan SDK pattern, constructed as raw instructions. Requires Solana automation wallet.

formSchema.label: Borrow asset mint
formSchema.placeholder: e.g. USDC mint or SOL wrapped

formSchema.label: Swap to mint (the arbitrage target)
formSchema.placeholder: Mint to swap into, then back
